result:
No errors — build is clean. All 5 compile errors fixed:

1. `config_file.c:29` — `os_strlength` → `os_strlen` (typo, function doesn't exist)
2. `../src/utils/eloop.c:615` — `timeout->time.seconds` → `timeout->time.sec` (wrong struct field)
3. `../src/rsn_supp/wpa.c:103` — `sm->pairwise_ciph` → `sm->pairwise_cipher` (wrong struct field)
4. `events.c:132` — `wpa_s->cur_ssid` → `wpa_s->current_ssid` (wrong struct field)
5. `scan.c:1137` — `eloop_register_timeout(...)` missing the 5th `user_data` argument (`NULL`)

`make` now completes with a full link of `wpa_supplicant`, `wpa_cli`, and `wpa_passphrase`, no errors.
